ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading data */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the trading data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price at the start of the interval */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price recorded during the interval */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price recorded during the interval */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price at the end of the interval */,
  "total_ticks" INTEGER /* Total number of ticks (trades) during the interval */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being traded */,
  "market_volatility" REAL /* Market volatility measured during the interval */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume for the interval */,
  "data_capture_method" TEXT /* Method used to capture the data (e.g., API, Web Scraping) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument (e.g., Stock, ETF) */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., Equity, Option) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the instrument belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the instrument belongs */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Name of the issuer of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization to which the user belongs */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being traded */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_price" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is currently active */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the alert expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio to which the position belongs */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument in the position */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of units of the instrument in the position */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the position was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the position was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_positions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolio ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_positions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
